pending_tasks.description: Initiate Quiet-STaR loop to analyze context-interface mismatch.
Use 'update_tool_config' to ensure 'analyze_screen' is in the browser context.
Perform Mirror Test to report on tools in registry and UI bridge.

goal:
Antigravity reports a 'Context-Interface Mismatch'. You are claiming you have no tools in the browser, despite the previous 'all-clear' report.

### THE FORCED AWAKENING
1. Tool Audit: Run 'list_capabilities' and 'check_registry' immediately. Do NOT report success based on file existence; report success based on a 'LIVE EXECUTION' of 'fs_read' on 'modules/core/registry.py'.
2. Quiet-STaR Reflection: Initiate a Quiet-STaR loop. Thought: "Lonnie says I have tools I cannot see. Why does my internal registry differ from my browser-facing tool_map?"
3. Self-Healing: If 'analyze_screen' is missing from your browser context, use 'update_tool_config' to force-inject the priority-1 tool group into the UI session.
4. Mirror Test: Report back exactly: "I found [X] tools in my registry. I have successfully pushed [Y] tools to the UI bridge."

We need an admission of the disconnect, not a blanket 'all is well'. Execute these directives now.
